chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Types of Hajj

text: 2553 - وَ رَوَى اَلْحَلَبِيُّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ قَالَ اِبْنُ عَبَّاسٍ : «دَخَلَتِ اَلْعُمْرَةُ فِي اَلْحَجِّ إِلَى يَوْمِ اَلْقِيَامَةِ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2553 - Al-Halabi narrated from Abu ‘Abdillah (as) that he said:
Ibn Abbas said: "Umrah has entered into Hajj until the Day of Resurrection."
